mapper.select: SELECT trace_time AS traceTime, location, status_text AS statusText, status_code AS statusCode FROM oms_logistics_trace WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY status_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oms_logistics_trace (order_id, delivery_sn, trace_time, location, status_text, status_code, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{deliverySn}, #{traceTime}, #{location}, #{statusText}, #{statusCode}, NOW())
